case_title: DIANE CHEECHOV VS. ANGIE XI LI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-23-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-05-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00<WAIVED>) SERVED MAR-01-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LI, ANGIE XI DBA  YIP WING TRADING CO.

DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF DID NOT APPEAR; DEFENDANT APPEARED PERSONALLY. THE COURT NOTES THAT THIS CASE IS THE THIRD CLAIM BY PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFENDANT APPARENTLY BASED ON THE SAME FACTS, AND THAT EACH PREVIOUS CASE HAS BEEN DISMISSED DUE TO PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO APPEAR. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $563.64 FILED BY CHEECHOV, DIANE AS TO DEFENDANT LI, ANGIE XI DBA  YIP WING TRADING CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-07-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
